funcbody:
func (m *routeMethods) isHandler() bool {
	return m.connect != nil ||
		m.delete != nil ||
		m.get != nil ||
		m.head != nil ||
		m.options != nil ||
		m.patch != nil ||
		m.post != nil ||
		m.propfind != nil ||
		m.put != nil ||
		m.trace != nil ||
		m.report != nil ||
		len(m.anyOther) != 0

}
